methods.description: Process for recovering and cataloguing camelid specimens from a specific locality using jackhammers, and preparing them for analysis.

steps.description: All specimens of the new camelid were recovered from the same locality with the use of jackhammers to remove the compact clayey matrix.
steps.searchable_summary: use jackhammers to extract camelid specimens from clayey matrix

steps.description: All specimens described herein are catalogued in the Vertebrate Paleontology Collection of the Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County.

methods.description: Procedure for measuring camelid specimens using Vernier calipers and performing statistical analysis on the data.

steps.description: All measurements were taken with a Vernier caliper to the nearest 0.1 mm.
steps.searchable_summary: measure specimens with Vernier caliper to 0.1 mm precision

steps.description: Standard statistical analyses of skeletal measurements were carried out with the Excel software program.
steps.searchable_summary: perform statistical analysis on measurements using Excel
